title: SERVICES AND PRICES
subtitle: Choose the optimal option for solving your requests

features.0: Full regression session lasting from 1.5 to 3.5 hours
features.1: Viewing and journeying through the spaces you need to solve your request (past life, childhood, soul world, life between lives, angel world, ancestry, etc.)

features.0: Full progression session lasting from 1.5 to 3.5 hours
features.1: Working with future segments of life, helps to find out potential scenarios and opportunities for your development in the future
features.2: Search for alternative options for human development
features.3: Working through past problems in regression (if necessary) to improve the future

features.0: 3 full sessions that provide an opportunity to more deeply work through several key moments of your life lasting from 1.5 to 3.5 hours
features.1: Individual discussion and planning of sessions and their topics according to the client's wishes, my consultation, answers to questions
features.2: 3 months of work - immersion 1 time per month + client support between sessions
Discussion and analysis of the request for processing

individualApproach.title: Individual Approach
individualApproach.description: Each client is unique, so I offer an individual approach to solving your requests. If you need a special program or have special needs, contact me to discuss individual terms of cooperation.
